actors.name: Citizen OS
actors.description: Estonian civic tech non-profit developing a free, open-source digital participation platform for participatory democracy. Founded in 2015 from environmental activism movements, enables communities to discuss, deliberate, and vote on decisions.
actors.contact_pathway: Roots in Estonian digital infrastructure, similar to Arbonics and Single.Earth
actors.notes: Direct collaborator candidate. Provides literal software architecture for Spaceship Earth governance approach. Working prototype of digital Assembly.

intel.value: Free open-source digital participation platform for discussions, proposals, and secure voting; international projects and training for civil society leaders
Civil society movements, active citizens, local municipalities
Estonian-based; part of Nordic-Baltic digital innovation ecosystem alongside Arbonics and Single.Earth
Ready-to-use open-source digital infrastructure for democratic decision-making; critical tool for simulating large-scale participatory democracy
Free, open-source platform for public/private discussions, proposal deliberation, and secure voting
Decentralized digital democracy enabling communities, municipalities, NGOs, and political parties to achieve consensus transparently

actors.name: Civic Tech Sweden
actors.description: Decentralized network of individuals, organizations, and public sector entities leveraging digital technology for public benefit. Closely intertwined with Open Knowledge Sweden.
actors.contact_pathway: Shares geographic and technological focus with Viable Cities and Kindship
actors.notes: Direct collaborator candidate. Network of hackers and civic technologists who could assist in building digital twins and tools for governance simulations.

intel.value: handlingar.se open-source Freedom of Information platform; hackathons and meetups on democracy/transparency, collaborative economy, and sustainable mobility
Open Knowledge Sweden (OKS), Agency for Digital Government (DIGG)
Swedish network consulting with national bodies like DIGG to shape Sweden's national open data portals and action plans
Grassroots technological capability to build Spaceship; fights for open data and algorithmic transparency ensuring data feeds for planetary boundary simulations are publicly accessible
handlingar.se - open-source FOI platform automating and publishing requests for public documents from Swedish authorities
Decentralized community organizing around three pillars: democracy/transparency, collaborative economy/commons, and sustainable mobility

projects.name: handlingar.se
projects.description: Open-source Freedom of Information platform that automates and publishes requests for public documents from Swedish authorities

intel.value: Automates FOI requests and publishes responses from Swedish government authorities
